With transparent pricing from $175 to $300, we provide effective, affordable solutions for roaches, ants, rodents, and other common household pests.

Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly treatments safe for families and pets, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee that keeps your West Farms home protected year-round.
localContext: West Farms' proximity to the Bronx Zoo, Botanical Garden, and the Bronx River creates a lush environment that can attract various pests to nearby residential areas. The neighborhood's diverse housing stock—from classic brick apartment buildings along Boston Road to single-family homes near Bronx Park—each presents distinct pest control needs that our team expertly addresses.

faqs.question: What pests are most common in West Farms, Bronx?
faqs.answer: West Farms residents most frequently encounter German cockroaches, mice, rats, ants, and bed bugs. The area's older apartment buildings and proximity to parks can create ideal conditions for these pests. Our general pest control service targets all common household pests with customized treatment plans.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control services in West Farms range from $175 to $300, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and type of pests. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees, and we offer competitive pricing for ongoing maintenance plans.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a pest problem in West Farms?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for West Farms residents in most cases. We understand that pest problems require immediate attention, especially in multi-family buildings where infestations can spread quickly. Call us before noon for potential same-day appointments.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in the latest application methods to minimize exposure while maximizing effectiveness, and we provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
